checkpoints.title: Telegram polling returning 401 Unauthorized
checkpoints.description: Bot token works for sending messages but automatic polling is failing with 401 error. OpenClaw cannot auto-receive messages from Telegram groups.
checkpoints.resolution: Fixed 2026-03-29 — corrected botToken from 8620551672 to 8600823477 in /docker/openclaw-uoas/.env file. Applied config.patch to openclaw.json, gateway restarted. Doctor confirms: Telegram ok (@Hatoomi_bot). Group session active.
findings: Bot token is valid — manual send works
Bot is in FAMILY BOT group (Chat ID: -5139970802)
Root cause: .env file had invalid token 8620551672
fix_applied: 2. Applied config.patch to openclaw.json with correct token
